description: Use SDMX statistical API mechanics for dataflows, dimensions, series keys, and data-query templates. Use when a selected provider exposes SDMX REST patterns and the task requires metadata-driven metadata+query mechanics with minimal probes.
priority_rule: exact source skill > explicit platform fingerprint > source/platform routing

direct_eval_recommendation_template.expected_content_type: SDMX structure XML/JSON or provider-specific SDMX metadata
direct_eval_recommendation_template.access_boundary: Open public SDMX metadata API. No key, token, registration, approval, or paid access is required.
direct_eval_recommendation_template.notes: For platform-only evaluation, return a verified dataflow/datastructure metadata API entry for the selected provider rather than inferring a provider-specific series key.

default_public_example.notes: Bundled smoke-test example only; do not treat OECD as the intended provider unless selected by the request or route.
